Headline: #21 Cermak buses Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Cermak/Lumber
ShortDescription: 21 Cermak buses are temporarily rerouted via Cermak, Lumber, Canal, Left turn on Grove, Cermak and over reg. route, due to street blockage near Cermak/Lumber.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #21 Cermak buses are temporarily rerouted via Cermak, Lumber, Canal, Left turn onto Grove, Cermak and over regular route, due to street blockage near Cermak/Lumber.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
